languages.text: "Во-вторых, нужно найти способ открыть ворота в обход Себериана. Проще всего было бы это сделать при наличии кодов доступа, но отец не поделился ими со мной. Без сомнения потому что я не являюсь его любимицей". {n}Аристократка усмехается, загибая второй палец.{/n}

traits.locale_text: "Во-вторых, нужно найти способ открыть ворота в обход Себериана. Проще всего было бы это сделать при наличии кодов доступа, но отец не поделился ими со мной. Без сомнения потому что я не являюсь его любимицей". {n}Аристократка усмехается, загибая второй палец.{/n}

languages.text: {n}She holds up a second finger.{/n} "Two: we must find a way to circumvent Seberian and open the gates. The easiest way to do that would be with the access codes, but my father has not shared them with me. No doubt because I am not his favourite," {n}she adds with a smile.{/n}
languages.original_text: "Во-вторых, нужно найти способ открыть ворота в обход Себериана. Проще всего было бы это сделать при наличии кодов доступа, но отец не поделился ими со мной. Без сомнения потому что я не являюсь его любимицей". {n}Аристократка усмехается, загибая второй палец.{/n}

{n}She holds up a second finger.{/n} "Two: we must find a way to circumvent Seberian and open the gates. The easiest way to do that would be with the access codes, but my father has not shared them with me. No doubt because I am not his favourite," {n}she adds with a smile.{/n}

{n}She holds up a second finger.{/n} "Two: we must find a way to circumvent Seberian and open the gates. The easiest way to do that would be with the access codes, but my father has not shared them with me. No doubt because I am not his favourite," {n}she adds with a smile.{/n}

languages.text: {n}Levanta un segundo dedo.{/n} «Dos: debemos encontrar la forma de evitar a Seberian y abrir las puertas. Lo más fácil sería usar los códigos de acceso, pero mi padre no los ha compartido conmigo. Porque no soy su favorita, sin duda». {n}Muestra una sonrisa irónica.{/n}
languages.original_text: {n}She holds up a second finger.{/n} "Two: we must find a way to circumvent Seberian and open the gates. The easiest way to do that would be with the access codes, but my father has not shared them with me. No doubt because I am not his favourite," {n}she adds with a smile.{/n}

traits.locale_text: {n}Levanta un segundo dedo.{/n} «Dos: debemos encontrar la forma de evitar a Seberian y abrir las puertas. Lo más fácil sería usar los códigos de acceso, pero mi padre no los ha compartido conmigo. Porque no soy su favorita, sin duda». {n}Muestra una sonrisa irónica.{/n}

languages.text: {n}她竖起第二根手指。{/n}“第二：我们必须想办法绕过塞贝里安，打开城门。最简单的方法当然是拿到通行密码，但我父亲没把密码告诉我。显然是因为我不是他最看重的人。”{n}她笑着补充道。{/n}
languages.original_text: {n}She holds up a second finger.{/n} "Two: we must find a way to circumvent Seberian and open the gates. The easiest way to do that would be with the access codes, but my father has not shared them with me. No doubt because I am not his favourite," {n}she adds with a smile.{/n}

traits.locale_text: {n}她竖起第二根手指。{/n}“第二：我们必须想办法绕过塞贝里安，打开城门。最简单的方法当然是拿到通行密码，但我父亲没把密码告诉我。显然是因为我不是他最看重的人。”{n}她笑着补充道。{/n}

languages.text: {n}Elle tend un deuxième doigt.{/n} « Deuxièmement : nous devons trouver un moyen de contourner Seberian et d'ouvrir les portes. Le plus simple serait d'utiliser les codes d'accès, mais mon père ne me les a pas communiqués. Sans doute parce que je n'ai pas le privilège d'être sa préférée, » {n}ajoute-t-elle avec un sourire.{/n}
languages.original_text: {n}She holds up a second finger.{/n} "Two: we must find a way to circumvent Seberian and open the gates. The easiest way to do that would be with the access codes, but my father has not shared them with me. No doubt because I am not his favourite," {n}she adds with a smile.{/n}

traits.locale_text: {n}Elle tend un deuxième doigt.{/n} « Deuxièmement : nous devons trouver un moyen de contourner Seberian et d'ouvrir les portes. Le plus simple serait d'utiliser les codes d'accès, mais mon père ne me les a pas communiqués. Sans doute parce que je n'ai pas le privilège d'être sa préférée, » {n}ajoute-t-elle avec un sourire.{/n}

languages.text: {n}İkinci bir parmağını kaldırıyor.{/n} "İki: Seberian'ı atlatıp kapıları açmanın bir yolunu bulmalıyız. Bunu yapmanın en kolay yolu, erişim kodlarını kullanmak olurdu ama babam onları benimle paylaşmadı. Şüphesiz en sevdiği ben olmadığımdan." {n}Gülümseyerek konuşmaya devam ediyor.{/n}
languages.original_text: {n}She holds up a second finger.{/n} "Two: we must find a way to circumvent Seberian and open the gates. The easiest way to do that would be with the access codes, but my father has not shared them with me. No doubt because I am not his favourite," {n}she adds with a smile.{/n}

traits.locale_text: {n}İkinci bir parmağını kaldırıyor.{/n} "İki: Seberian'ı atlatıp kapıları açmanın bir yolunu bulmalıyız. Bunu yapmanın en kolay yolu, erişim kodlarını kullanmak olurdu ama babam onları benimle paylaşmadı. Şüphesiz en sevdiği ben olmadığımdan." {n}Gülümseyerek konuşmaya devam ediyor.{/n}

languages.text: {n}Sie hebt einen zweiten Finger.{/n} "Zweitens: Wir müssen Seberian irgendwie umgehen und das Tor öffnen. Das wäre am einfachsten mit den Zugangscodes, aber mein Vater hat sie mir nicht verraten. Ich bin wohl nicht seine Lieblingstochter", {n}fügt sie grinsend hinzu.{/n}
languages.original_text: {n}She holds up a second finger.{/n} "Two: we must find a way to circumvent Seberian and open the gates. The easiest way to do that would be with the access codes, but my father has not shared them with me. No doubt because I am not his favourite," {n}she adds with a smile.{/n}

traits.locale_text: {n}Sie hebt einen zweiten Finger.{/n} "Zweitens: Wir müssen Seberian irgendwie umgehen und das Tor öffnen. Das wäre am einfachsten mit den Zugangscodes, aber mein Vater hat sie mir nicht verraten. Ich bin wohl nicht seine Lieblingstochter", {n}fügt sie grinsend hinzu.{/n}

languages.text: {n}彼女は2本指を立てた。「2つ目、シベリアを迂回する方法を見つけなければならない。最も簡単な方法はアクセスコードを使うことだが、父は私にそれを教えてくれない。きっと私を気に入っていないからだろう」と彼女は微笑みながら言った。{/n}
languages.original_text: {n}She holds up a second finger.{/n} "Two: we must find a way to circumvent Seberian and open the gates. The easiest way to do that would be with the access codes, but my father has not shared them with me. No doubt because I am not his favourite," {n}she adds with a smile.{/n}
